description: Syntax highlighting, hover docs, snippets, live parse errors, and OpenQASM transpile for the Qora quantum toy language.
command.transpile.title: Qora: Transpile to OpenQASM
command.showStages.title: Qora: Show Compilation Stages (AST / IR / OpenQASM)
command.openExample.title: Qora: Open Example
command.newBellExample.title: Qora: New Bell Example
command.openWalkthrough.title: Qora: Open Getting Started
walkthrough.gettingStarted.title: Get Started with Qora
walkthrough.gettingStarted.description: Create a Qora file, try a Bell circuit, and transpile it to OpenQASM.
walkthrough.step.createBell.title: Start with a Bell Circuit
walkthrough.step.createBell.description:
Open a ready-made Qora example, or create a smaller Bell example in a new unsaved editor.
[Open Demo](command:qora.openExample)
[Create Bell Example](command:qora.newBellExample)
walkthrough.step.transpile.title: Transpile to OpenQASM
walkthrough.step.transpile.description:
With a Qora file active, send it through the bundled parser and open the generated OpenQASM beside your source.
[Transpile Active File](command:qora.transpile)
walkthrough.step.stages.title: Inspect the Pipeline
walkthrough.step.stages.description:
Watch the same source move through AST, QoraIR, inverse IR, and OpenQASM so the language feels less like a black box.
[Show Compilation Stages](command:qora.showStages)
